channel.title: VITA1001 Modern Pharma
channel.description: A podcast featuring modern pharma career journeys. Stories from the drug development world — from discovery to market. VITA1001 Modern Pharma sits down with scientists, clinicians, CMC and QA/QC professionals, project managers and more to explore how medicines move from idea to patient — and the people behind every step.
channel.itunes:author: VITA1001
channel.itunes:summary: A podcast featuring modern pharma career journeys. Stories from the drug development world — from discovery to market.

item.title: EP 05: From Bench to IND — A CMC Scientist's Journey
item.description: We talk with a CMC scientist about the path from early-stage formulation development through IND-enabling studies.

item.title: EP 04: Life as a Clinical Research Associate in Oncology
item.description: A CRA shares what it's really like to monitor oncology trials across multiple sites.

item.title: EP 03: QA/QC in Biologics — Ensuring Every Batch Counts
item.description: Quality professionals discuss the unique challenges of QA/QC in biologics manufacturing.

item.title: EP 02: Project Management in Pharma — Herding Cats Across Functions
item.description: A pharma project manager reveals how they coordinate between R&D, regulatory, commercial, and manufacturing teams.

item.title: EP 01: Welcome — Why We're Telling Pharma's Untold Stories
item.description: In our debut episode, we share why we started VITA1001 Modern Pharma and what we hope to explore.
